---
name: 🎨 UI Improvement
about: Suggest a visual or UX improvement for the interface
title: "[UI] "
labels: ui, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Area To Improve

Specify the page, component, or flow that should be improved.

## Current Experience

Describe the current UI or UX issue.

## Suggested Improvement

Describe the visual or interaction improvement you would like to see.

## Why This Matters

Explain how the proposed change would improve usability, accessibility, or polish.

## Screenshots Or References

Attach screenshots, mockups, recordings, or links to inspiration if available.

## Additional Notes

Add any extra implementation notes or constraints here.
